title: release metadata post-close PR
rawUserRequest: 同意，走完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程后再发布；每次发现流程问题都从根本上修改，不做表面重复。当前只修正发布冻结后的受保护主分支流程，不启动或跳过任何计划内工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 将发布冻结后的 release.json 与 release-freeze.json 投影纳入受保护主分支的独立 PR 生命周期，并在合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步后再进行最终发布确认。

outOfScope: Any adopter project or installed runtime repository
Starting or reordering planned Work Items
Changing release archive encoding or publication workflow logic

sources.reason: Post-close release metadata must pass repository PR protection before publication.
Generated supply-chain digest projection updated when release.json changes.

riskAssessment.reason: Only export-ignored release projections change; source archive identity remains stable.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the corrective post-close release metadata PR and publication confirmation.

preReviewWarnings: Verify exact post-close source identity, PR protection, required checks, and no plan Work Item changes.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Protected main rejects direct release metadata push
Metadata PR preserves canonical archive identity

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json and release-freeze.json match the canonical archive identity after ai-close-work-item and default-base synchronization.
The metadata-only PR passes template-smoke and compatibility-gate before merge; no planned Work Item is started or reordered.
PR merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, default-base equality, and final release preflight complete successfully.
guidelines: Release metadata is generated only after Work Item closure and synchronized default-base state.
Template release evidence remains separate from adopter runtime state.
Budget and formatting preflight evidence must pass before PR; any measured archive growth is explicitly reserved in the same corrective Work Item.

intent.problem: Repository rules reject direct post-close metadata pushes, so final freeze projections must themselves use a PR and required checks before publication.
constraints: Do not start or reorder planned Work Items.
Preserve canonical archive encoding and prior evidence.
intent.rationale: A dedicated corrective PR makes the final release projection comply with the same protected-main lifecycle as every other governed change.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the complete corrective release workflow including PR, merge, closure, and publication confirmation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
